section.title: Introduction
section.para: The opennlp-wordnet module loads a WordNet-style lexicon into a LexicalKnowledgeBase and looks up synsets by lemma and part of speech. Two readers are provided: WnLmfReader for the Global WordNet Association WN-LMF XML interchange format, and WndbReader for the classic Princeton WordNet database file layout. Both return an immutable, thread-safe knowledge base. On top of lookup, the module can Morphy-lemmatize, expand a term through synonym and hypernym links, and score synset similarity on the hypernym graph.

section.title: Loading a lexicon
Lookup
Morphy lemmatization
Lexical expansion
Synset similarity
